results.title: JavaScript Course for Beginners – Your First Step to Web Development
results.reason: Mosh is widely praised in comments for his 'no-fluff' approach and logical progression, making it the gold standard for absolute beginners.
summary: Learn how to write your first script
Understand how to store data in variables
See how to work with simple data types
Discover how to use functions and arrays

results.title: JavaScript Crash Course For Beginners
results.reason: Traversy provides the most depth for a 'basics' video, covering modern ES6+ syntax that viewers find essential for real-world work.
summary: Master the basic building blocks of code
Learn to change things on a webpage
Understand how to handle user mouse clicks
Build a simple project from the start

results.title: 100+ JavaScript Concepts you Need to Know
results.reason: While highly popular, the fast-paced '100+ concepts' format is better for a high-level overview than foundational learning.
summary: Get a quick look at modern features
Learn how the language works behind scenes
Explore many different tools and ideas fast
Understand how to organize your code better

results.title: JavaScript tutorial for beginners 🌐
results.reason: Excellent step-by-step setup instructions (VS Code, HTML) make this very accessible for someone who has never written a line of code.
summary: Start coding with easy to follow steps
Learn to show messages on the screen
Understand how to do math with code
Practice using simple logic and rules

results.title: Learn All the JavaScript Basics in 20 Minutes
results.reason: A solid, concise summary of syntax that viewers appreciate for its efficiency and lack of distractions.
summary: Learn the most important parts very fast
Understand how to repeat tasks with loops
See how to make decisions in code
Build a solid base for web projects
